state_transitions.trigger: start() called — initiates GraphQL + RabbitMQ connections
GraphQL endpoint accessible and RabbitMQ (if configured) connects
GraphQL or RabbitMQ health check fails 3 consecutive times
Both GraphQL and RabbitMQ (if subscribed) health checks pass

params.name: cmms_graphql_url
params.description: CMMS GraphQL endpoint (e.g., http://localhost:3000/graphql). Primary data source for maintenance entities: assets, work orders, work requests, kits, inventory locations, investigations.

params.name: cmms_rest_url
params.description: CMMS REST API base URL (e.g., http://localhost:3000/api). Secondary source for reference data: vendors, items, users.

params.name: rabbitmq_url
params.description: RabbitMQ AMQP URL (e.g., amqp://guest:guest@localhost:5672). Optional — required only if CMMS will subscribe to ERPI master data topics (item, vendor, inventory).

params.name: jwt_token
params.description: JWT bearer token for authenticated GraphQL/REST requests. Not required if CMMS has unauthenticated endpoints.

params.name: rabbitmq_consumer_group
params.description: Consumer group ID for RabbitMQ queue naming. Must be unique to Forge to avoid stealing messages from other consumers.

params.name: poll_interval_seconds
params.description: GraphQL polling interval for work orders, assets, maintenance requests (10-3600 seconds).

data_sources.description: Primary source: GraphQL polling of core maintenance entities. Assets with ISA-95 hierarchy, work orders with lifecycle tracking, work requests with dual-approval governance.
Inventory management: maintenance kits (pre-assembled item sets), inventory locations, and inventory investigations (physical count vs. digital count reconciliation).
Reference data: items, vendors, and users. Cross-referenced with ERPI master data for cost tracking and vendor management.
REST API for historical backfill and reference lookups. Covers all 11 Prisma entities.
ERPI master data topics for inventory enrichment. Items, vendors, purchase orders, production orders, and inventory transfers.

cross_module_data_flows.description: ERP-originated master data enriches maintenance cost tracking with item pricing, vendor information, and purchase order references.
Scheduled maintenance windows (from WorkOrder.scheduledStart/End) must be communicated to MES for production scheduling constraints.
Inventory audit reconciliation coordinates with warehouse operations for physical count verification.

mappings.description: Unique identifier from CMMS. Uses globalId for ERP-synced entities, falls back to local CUID for CMMS-native entities.
Prisma model name: Asset, WorkOrder, WorkRequest, Kit, Item, Vendor, InventoryLocation, InventoryInvestigation.
Business event type: create, update, delete, status_change.
Fixed operation context — all CMMS data is maintenance domain.

mappings.transform: lookup:{Asset: equipment_maintenance, WorkOrder: maintenance, WorkRequest: maintenance, Kit: inventory, Item: inventory, Vendor: procurement, InventoryLocation: inventory, InventoryInvestigation: audit}
mappings.description: Maps entity type to maintenance domain category for cross-module analysis.
ISA-95 equipment identifier. Present for work orders and assets. Links to CMMS asset registry.
ISA-95 equipment hierarchy path (e.g., WHK01/Distillery01/Utility01/Pump01). Hierarchical physical location for the maintained asset.
Maintenance type: preventive, corrective, predictive. Determines scheduling and priority logic.
Maintenance priority: low, medium, high, critical. Drives scheduling precedence.
Work order lifecycle status: Scheduled, Active, Completed, Cancelled.
Boolean — maintenance supervisor has approved this work request.
Boolean — operations supervisor has approved this work request. Both approvals required before scheduling.
Maintenance kit reference — pre-assembled item sets for specific maintenance tasks.
Inventory storage location path for kit items and spare parts.
Cron expression for recurring preventive maintenance (e.g., '0 9 1 */3 *' = quarterly at 9am).
NetSuite ERP identifier for cross-system reconciliation.
Planned maintenance start time. Critical for MES production scheduling coordination.
Expected maintenance duration (ISO 8601 duration). Used with scheduled_start to define maintenance windows.

enrichment_rules.description: Auto-classify CMMS entities into maintenance domain categories.
Resolve flat asset ID to ISA-95 hierarchical equipment path by traversing CMMS asset parent chain.

metadata.erp_integration: NetSuite (indirect, via ERPI for item/vendor sync)
metadata.cross_module_dependencies: ERPI (master data), MES (maintenance window scheduling), WMS (inventory reconciliation)
metadata.notes: Smallest spoke codebase. Equipment context from CMMS enriches every other module — assets, work orders, and maintenance status are cross-cutting operational data. Dual-approval governance (maintenance supervisor + operations supervisor) is a key business rule. Phase 1 adapter is read-only via GraphQL polling.

change_history.reason: Initial CMMS FACTS spec drafted from spoke discovery.

D3.8 FTTS compliance: restructured from non-standard format to FACTS-compliant 10-section schema. Added context_mapping (18 field mappings), error_handling (retry+circuit breaker+dead letter), metadata (deployment details), integrity (hash tracking). Migrated domain_mappings, governance, known_patterns, phase_1_limitations, and related_adapters into standard FACTS sections.
